name: realanalyst
description: Platform-neutral metadata-first analysis system with Codex skills as the first adapter.

interface.shortDescription: Metadata-first analysis system with skill routing.
interface.longDescription: RealAnalyst uses Metadata, Runtime Registry, and Job cores to support dataset registration, metadata maintenance, controlled analysis execution, report verification, and feedback-driven refinement. Codex skills are the first adapter, not the product boundary.
defaultPrompt: 从 RA:getting-started 开始做最小状态检查，并推荐下一步 skill。
用 RA:metadata 注册一个数据集并维护字段、指标和业务口径。
用 RA:analysis-run 基于已准备好的 metadata 和 registry 执行正式分析。
用 RA:metadata-report 查看已有数据集的长期口径说明。
